title: Fix Time Zone & Global Control popups: reposition left, restore local time and font size controls

requirements.text: Reposition the Time Zone button popup so it opens to the left-hand side, anchored close to the Time Zone button, instead of its current position.

quotes: Place the pop up box of the Time Zone button and Global Control button to the left hand side, close to the button.

acceptanceCriteria: The Time Zone popup renders to the left of (or left-aligned near) the Time Zone button.
The popup does not overlap unrelated UI elements or extend off-screen.
No other popups or UI elements are repositioned.

requirements.text: Reposition the Global Control button popup so it opens to the left-hand side, anchored close to the Global Control button, instead of its current position.

quotes: Place the pop up box of the Time Zone button and Global Control button to the left hand side, close to the button.

acceptanceCriteria: The Global Control popup renders to the left of (or left-aligned near) the Global Control button.
The popup does not overlap unrelated UI elements or extend off-screen.
No other popups or UI elements are repositioned.

requirements.text: Restore the Local Time display inside the Time Zone button's popup box. It should show the local time (with UTC offset) as it previously appeared before it was removed.

quotes: Put the Local time display back into the Pop up box of the Time Zone Button

acceptanceCriteria: The Time Zone popup contains a visible local time display with the current time and UTC offset.
The local time updates correctly based on the selected or detected timezone.
No other content in the Time Zone popup is removed or rearranged.

requirements.text: Re-add the Font Size control (slider or input) to the Global Control popup, placed directly below the Globe Rotation control.

quotes: Font Size control has been removed? please add back to Global Control right below Globe Rotation

acceptanceCriteria: The Global Control popup contains a Font Size control rendered immediately below the Globe Rotation control.
Adjusting the Font Size control changes the relevant font size in the UI as it did previously.
Globe Rotation control remains functional and is unaffected by this change.

constraints: Changes must be scoped only to the Time Zone popup, Global Control popup, and their parent button components in LocationMapExplorer.tsx.
Do not modify any other popups, panels, or UI elements.
Do not modify any files listed under frontend.immutablePaths.
nonGoals: Adding new features to any popup beyond those explicitly listed.
Changing backend logic or data models.
